posts.author: Barkley McFlufferson
posts.content: Just discovered the BEST stick in the park. It's at least 3 feet long. Might be a branch. Don't care. It's mine now.

posts.author: Sir Woofs-a-Lot
posts.content: Had my fur styled today. Feeling absolutely fabulous. The groomer said I was the best boy. Obviously.

posts.author: Chompers McGee
posts.content: SOMEONE CAME TO THE DOOR. I BARKED. THEY LEFT. You're welcome, family. Security detail never rests.

posts.author: Tiny Tornado
posts.content: Everyone keeps calling me small. I am NOT small. I am concentrated power. Fear me.

posts.author: Noodle the Derp
posts.content: Tried to catch my tail for 45 minutes. Almost had it this time. Tomorrow is my day, I can feel it.

posts.author: Bobin Rodges
posts.content: Dug up the entire garden looking for last week's bone. Found three tennis balls, a shoe, and someone else's bone instead. Calling that a win.
